summary: Sprint 7 verification (Elite Concierge, Smart Homepage personalization, Rider Wallet) — 23/23 backend pytest tests passed + full Playwright coverage of Priya artist Concierge, Admin Concierge, Admin Rider Wallet CRUD, Customer Smart Homepage personalized rails, and Customer BookingFlow rider-wallet-block. All acceptance criteria met.
critical_code_review_comments: concierge.py _post_message uses HTTPException(400) on empty body — good. No timezone issue (uses utcnow() passed in).
rider_wallet.py public_list city filter: if `city` query is provided, uses $or [{city:null},{city:regex}]. Correct.
rider_wallet.py admin_create ignores id/created_at overwrite risk since body is a strict VendorBody. Safe.
homepage.py personal rails: Counter import re-imports inside function (minor perf). Not critical.

AdminConcierge.jsx uses `concierge-thread-list` prefix which collides with `concierge-thread-<id>` selectors. Recommend renaming the container testid to `concierge-threads-container` to avoid ambiguity, though not blocking (filter can exclude).
BookingFlow.jsx step4-next correctly gated by travel_ack — works.
Rider Wallet Delete confirmation is via window.confirm — acceptable for admin-only tooling.
test_credentials: Used the seeded creds in /app/memory/test_credentials.md (admin, customer, priya).
seed_data_creation: Created and cleaned up TEST_UI_Hotel_29 rider vendor. Left Priya on ELITE plan. Concierge thread reopened for testing then a UI reply sent — leaves thread OPEN.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Backend endpoints all under /api. Concierge collections: concierge_threads / concierge_messages. Rider wallet: rider_vendors (seeded with 7 nationwide docs). Homepage personalized rails require search_history seeding via GET /api/search/artists with q/city/category. Priya's package d0f4c3c1-875e-408e-9668-d92a1e5fe06e has travel_required/accommodation_required/local_transport_required=True — reuse it to test BookingFlow step 4. In BookingFlow, time buttons use testid `time-<HHMM>` without leading zeros (e.g. time-700 for 7pm, time-1100 for 11pm). Package option testid is `pkg-opt-<id>`. The `concierge-thread-list` container testid collides with the row prefix `concierge-thread-<id>`; when selecting rows, exclude the container.
